name: interlace-console
description: Unified React + FastAPI dashboard for managing downloads via aria2 and playback on Kodi

scripts.ci: npm run lint:backend && npm run test:backend
scripts.restart: npm run doctor && echo '' && echo 'Building frontend assets...' && npm run build:frontend && echo 'Restarting services...' && systemctl --user restart aria2.service interlace.service && sudo systemctl restart kodi.service && echo 'All services restarted successfully!'
scripts.start: npm run doctor && echo '' && echo 'Building frontend assets...' && npm run build:frontend && echo 'Starting services...' && systemctl --user restart aria2.service interlace.service && sudo systemctl restart kodi.service && echo 'All services started successfully!'
